With a decade of experience scaling SaaS companies globally, he has already grown a company from zero to customers in 100+ countries, leveraging his unique blend of development, marketing, and sales skills. He is the co-founder of SEOwind, a tool that helps create SEO content briefs in minutes rather than hours.
seo-profiles.name: Tom Winter
seo-profiles.contribution: Scaled a SaaS globally; building SEOwind.io for AI-assisted content. Focuses on integrating AI with content strategy.
Leverages her B2B-honed skills (podcasts, thought leadership) now in consumer content.
